Learning Made Personal

AIVO adapts to every child's unique needs, using AI to create joyful, effective learning experiences for children on the autism spectrum.

Get Started FreeSign In

Adaptive AI

Lessons that adjust in real-time to your child's pace and learning style.

Sensory-Friendly

Customizable themes, reduced animations, and calming color palettes.

Progress Tracking

Detailed insights and analytics so you can celebrate every milestone.
